title: Texas War of Independence
subject: Texas War of Independence
program_outcome: This syllabus explores the Texas War of Independence, focusing on its causes, political context, key battles, and lasting impact.

classes.title: Introduction to the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class introduces the Texas War of Independence, setting the historical context and significance.
terminal: Describe the significance of the Texas War of Independence in American history
enabling: Identify the geographical region of Texas and its neighboring territories in the early 19th century
Summarize the initial conditions in Texas under Mexican rule

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class explores the causes that led to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: List the main causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Explain the role of Mexican policies on Texas settlers
Describe the impact of cultural and political differences between Texas settlers and the Mexican government

classes.title: The Road to War
classes.summary: This class examines the events and tensions that escalated towards war.
terminal: Outline the key events leading up to the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify major events such as the Battle of Gonzales
Analyze how these events contributed to the escalation of conflict

classes.title: Political Context and Key Figures
classes.summary: This class covers the political context and introduces key figures in the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Identify key political figures and their roles in the war
enabling: Discuss the political environment in Texas and Mexico during the war
Recognize key figures such as Sam Houston and Antonio López de Santa Anna

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class focuses on the major battles and military strategies of the war.
terminal: Describe the major battles and their outcomes
enabling: Detail the events of battles such as the Alamo and San Jacinto
Explain the military strategies used by both sides

classes.title: The Alamo: Symbolism and Legacy
classes.summary: This class examines the significance of the Battle of the Alamo in history and its symbolism today.
terminal: Explain the historical and modern significance of the Alamo
enabling: Discuss the events of the Battle of the Alamo
Analyze how the Alamo has been remembered and symbolized in American culture

classes.title: Consequences and Impact of the War
classes.summary: This class explores the outcomes and long-term impacts of the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Evaluate the consequences of the Texas War of Independence on Texas and the United States
enabling: Identify the immediate outcomes of the war
Discuss the long-term political and cultural impacts on Texas and the US
